doc_go_contract: git collection, repository discovery, snapshot capture, and parser input shaping for PCG indexing runs
ownership: source-of-truth for what files exist in a snapshot and the metadata attached to them; does not make graph projection or query-time truth decisions

key_types.Service: poll-and-dispatch loop; Source + Committer + optional AfterBatchDrained
key_types.Source: interface yielding one CollectedGeneration per call
key_types.CollectedGeneration: one repo-scoped generation: Scope, Generation, Facts channel, FactCount, DiscoveryAdvisory
key_types.GitSource: implements Source; runs NativeRepositorySelector then NativeRepositorySnapshotter workers
key_types.NativeRepositorySnapshotter: implements RepositorySnapshotter; discovery -> pre-scan -> parse -> materialize -> advisory
key_types.RepositorySnapshot: parse output: RepoPath, RemoteURL, FileCount, ImportsMap, FileData, ContentFileMetas, ContentEntities, DiscoveryAdvisory
key_types.SelectedRepository: RepoPath, RemoteURL, IsDependency, DisplayName, Language, FileTargets
key_types.ContentFileSnapshot: portable file-content record; body re-read via two-phase streaming
key_types.ContentFileMeta: body-free file metadata for two-phase snapshot architecture
key_types.ContentEntitySnapshot: entity record: EntityID, RelativePath, EntityType, EntityName, StartLine, EndLine, etc.
key_types.ClaimedService: wraps Service with a ClaimControlStore for workflow-coordinator-gated collection
key_types.SnapshotSCIPConfig: SCIP runtime contract (Enabled, Languages, Indexer, Parser)
key_types.DiscoveryAdvisoryReport: operator-facing JSON summary of discovery + materialization shape per snapshot run

steps: if !ok: run AfterBatchDrained if batch had commits, then wait PollInterval

phases: Phase 2: resolveRepositories (absolute paths, stable sourceRunID via facts.StableID)
Phase 3: two-lane scheduling (smallCh + largeCh); large repos acquire largeSem before snapshotting
workers: s.SnapshotWorkers (default 8); priority: small repos first
coordinator goroutine closes s.stream when all workers finish
git_source_stream.large_repo_semaphore: largeSem cap = LargeRepoMaxConcurrent; classification by isLargeRepository (file-count pre-scan, skips .git/node_modules/vendor)

stages: discovery: resolveNativeSnapshotFileSet (discovery.ResolveRepositoryFileSetsWithStats); repo overrides from .pcg/discovery.json and .pcg/vendor-roots.json via discoveryOptionsWithRepoDiscoveryConfig
native_snapshotter.two_phase_memory: ContentFileMeta carries no body; streamFacts re-reads from disk at emit time so memory is O(single_file)

deferred_maintenance.called_from: Service.AfterBatchDrained after each full batch drain

env_vars.PCG_REPOSITORY_RULES_JSON: JSON list of repository selection rules
env_vars.PCG_FILESYSTEM_DIRECT: skip git discovery in filesystem mode
env_vars.PCG_DISCOVERY_IGNORED_PATH_GLOBS: comma/newline-separated globs for CollectorDiscovery to skip

log_events: collector commit succeeded / collector commit failed
collector stream completed / collector stream failed
